brand.name: Ordre
brand.tagline: Purchase orders, without losing the thread.

landing.heroTitle: Know exactly what's committed, what's been invoiced, and how much is left to spend.
landing.heroSubtitle: Ordre tracks purchase orders, runs them through your team's approval rules, and reconciles every invoice line by line. No spreadsheets. No lost email threads.
landing.pillarCommitBody: Raise a purchase order with its line items — description, category, quantity, price. Save as a draft or send it up for approval.
landing.pillarApproveBody: The right people get notified, approve with a comment or reject with one. Every decision is logged, stamped, and searchable.
landing.pillarReconcileBody: Upload the invoice, map it back to the lines, and the remaining balance on each line updates instantly. When it hits zero, close the PO.
landing.previewTitle: One PO, four numbers that matter
landing.footerNote: Built for audiovisual production teams and small offices.

login.title: Welcome back.
login.subtitle: Pick up where you left off. We sign you in with your Google account.
login.error: Couldn't sign you in. Try again in a few seconds.

signup.title: Get started with Ordre.
signup.subtitle: One Google click and your workspace is ready. No credit card, no friction.
signup.terms: By continuing you agree to the Terms and Privacy policy.
signup.error: Could not create your account. Please try again.

projects.listSubtitle: Each project is a space with its own suppliers, purchase orders, and members.

empty.title: You don't have any projects yet.
empty.body: Create your first project to start tracking purchase orders, approvals, and invoices.

projects.createSubtitle: A short name is enough. You can invite the rest of the team after.

dashboard.subtitle: {{project}} — overview.
dashboard.emptyMetricNote: Add data to see numbers here

emptyState.title: This project is still empty.
emptyState.body: Once you add suppliers, purchase orders, and invoices, you'll see committed, invoiced, and per-line remaining figures right here.

dashboard.recentActivityEmpty: No activity yet. Things your team does will show up here.
dashboard.stubNotice: The full views (POs, suppliers, approvals) land in the next iteration.

members.title: Project members
members.subtitle: {{count}} people have access to {{project}}.
members.addSubtitle: Enter the email of someone who already has an Ordre account.
members.emailNotFound: This person doesn't have an Ordre account yet. Ask them to sign in with Google first.

roleCaption.owner: Can edit everything and manage members.
roleCaption.editor: Can create and change POs, suppliers, and invoices.
roleCaption.approver: Can approve POs and record bill payments. Cannot edit POs.

members.cannotRemoveYourself: An owner can't leave while they're the only one.
members.ownerOnly: Only the owner can make changes here.

app.welcomeBody: Pick an existing project or create a new one to get started.
app.stubBody: Dashboard, PO list, reconciliation detail, PO creation, supplier directory, and the approvals queue are being ported from the reference prototype to Firestore-backed pages.

errorPage.title: Something went wrong.
errorPage.body: An unexpected error interrupted this page. Your data is safe — try going back or reloading.
errorPage.contact: Need help? Write to us at

notFound.title: This page doesn't exist.
notFound.body: The link might be out of date, or the PO has moved.
notFound.projectBody: Either it doesn't exist or you don't have access. Go back to your projects.
notFound.contact: Need help? Write to us at

suppliers.heroSubtitle: Suppliers for {{project}}. Every purchase order is tied to one of these.
suppliers.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, tax ID or tag…

empty.title: No suppliers yet.
empty.body: Add your first supplier record to start creating purchase orders against them.

emptyFilter.title: No matches
emptyFilter.body: Try different text or drop the filters.

form.tradeNameHint: How it appears inside the project. If empty, we'll use the legal name.
form.confirmDelete: Delete {{name}}? Past POs won't be affected.

suppliers.viewerNotice: Read-only. Editors and owners can create and modify suppliers.

attachments.emptyReadOnly: This project is read-only for you.
attachments.deleteConfirm: Delete this file? It's also removed from Storage.
attachments.uploadError: Couldn't upload the file. Please try again.

supplierDocs.modalSubtitle: Contracts, certificates, and any file you want on hand. Up to 25 MB per file.

poAttachments.subtitle: Quote, email thread, delivery note, or any file that gives context to this PO.
poAttachments.empty: No attachments. Upload the quote or the email thread to keep the context with the PO.

pos.heroSubtitle: All POs in {{project}}. Filter by status to see what's pending, approved, or closed.

empty.title: No purchase orders yet.
empty.body: Create your first PO to start tracking commitments and reconciling invoices line by line.

emptyFilter.title: No POs match
emptyFilter.body: Try a different status or search term.

poDetail.invoicesEmpty: No invoices yet. Upload the first when it arrives.
poDetail.invoicesEmptyRole: This project is read-only for you.
poDetail.overBudgetWarning: This PO is over-invoiced. Review the lines highlighted in red.

pricing.title: Easy to start, grow at your pace.
pricing.subtitle: One project to try the whole thing. Upgrade to Pro when you want more.

plans.freeSubtitle: To try Ordre with a single project.

pricing.featureFree2: Unlimited suppliers, POs and invoices per project
pricing.fallbackNote: Final price confirmed at checkout, in your currency.

paywall.unlockProjectsBody: The Free plan covers 1 project. Upgrade to Ordre Pro to create as many as you need and invite your whole team.
paywall.dismissedToast: You're still on Free. You can upgrade any time.
paywall.disabledNotice: Web billing isn't configured in this environment.

subscription.portalUnavailable: The billing portal becomes available after your first purchase.

poForm.createSubtitle: Add the lines and submit for approval when it's ready.
poForm.editSubtitle: This PO is still a draft. Edit freely until you submit it.
poForm.supplierMissing: No suppliers yet. Create one first.
poForm.notesPlaceholder: What is this PO for? e.g. Set dressing — week 3.
poForm.noLines: Add at least one line with a description and price.
poForm.noApprovers: This project has no owner who can approve. Promote someone to owner before submitting.
poForm.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
poForm.confirmDeleteDraft: Delete this draft? It can't be undone.

poActions.approveSubtitle: The decision is logged with your name, a timestamp, and the comment.
poActions.rejectSubtitle: A short reason helps the requester re-scope and resubmit.
poActions.closeConfirm: Close this PO? It won't accept new invoices.
poActions.deleteConfirm: Permanently delete this PO and all its data? This cannot be undone.

poDecision.approveSubtitle: Upload the bill and enter the amount. The remaining budget is updated immediately.
poDecision.approvedClosedToast: Bill recorded — PO is now fully invoiced and closed
poDecision.mappingMismatch: Line mapping ({{mapped}}) doesn't match the total ({{total}}).

projectSettings.subtitle: Advanced settings for {{project}}. Only the owner can make changes here.
projectSettings.descriptionHint: How you'd describe it to someone outside the project.
projectSettings.ownershipHint: Pick another member as the owner. You'll be demoted to editor.
projectSettings.ownershipConfirm: Hand ownership of {{name}}? You'll be demoted to editor and can't undo this unless the new owner promotes you back.
projectSettings.archiveBody: Hide the project from the active list without deleting any data. You can restore it anytime.
projectSettings.archiveConfirm: Archive {{name}}? No data is lost and you can reactivate it anytime.
projectSettings.dangerBody: Delete this project permanently. Only allowed when the project has no suppliers, categories or purchase orders. If there's data, archive it instead.
projectSettings.deleteDisabledReason: {{suppliers}} suppliers, {{categories}} categories and {{pos}} POs block the permanent delete. Archive or empty it first.
projectSettings.deleteConfirm: This can't be undone. Type the exact project name to confirm.
projectSettings.deleteError: Couldn't delete the project. Please try again.
projectSettings.ownerOnlyBanner: Only the owner can make changes on this page.
projectSettings.archivedBanner: This project is archived. Edits still go through, but it won't show up in the main list.

categories.heroSubtitle: The chart of accounts for {{project}}. Every PO rolls up to one of these codes.

empty.title: No categories yet.
empty.body: Add one by hand or import a CSV with a code + concept column (like a production chart of accounts).

categories.viewerNotice: Read-only. Editors and owners can add or change categories.

form.duplicateError: A category with that code already exists.
form.error: Couldn't save the category. Please try again.

import.title: Import categories
import.subtitle: Paste the CSV content or upload a file. Two columns expected: code and concept. The first header row is optional.
import.previewHint: First 8 rows. On import, existing categories with the same code will be updated.
import.previewEmpty: Nothing to import yet. Paste the CSV or upload a file.
import.collisionsWarning: {{count}} codes appear more than once in the CSV. We'll keep the last occurrence.
import.resultError: Import couldn't finish. Please try again.

poCategory.label: Accounting category
poCategory.noneAvailable: No categories in this project yet. Create or import some first.

invoiceForm.subtitle: Upload the document and map its amount to the PO lines.
invoiceForm.mappingHint: Specify how much of the invoice maps to each line. The total should match the invoice amount.
invoiceForm.overBudgetWarning: This amount is above the line's remaining budget. You can still save it; the line will be marked as over-invoiced.
invoiceForm.error: Couldn't save the invoice. Please try again.
invoiceForm.confirmDelete: Delete this invoice? The uploaded file is removed too.
invoiceForm.invalid: Fill in the required fields (number, total, file) before saving.
invoiceForm.noLines: Assign the amount to at least one PO line.

approvalsQueue.heroSubtitle: POs waiting on your decision in {{project}}.
approvalsQueue.allCaughtUpBody: Nothing is waiting on your response right now.
approvalsQueue.noDecisions: You haven't decided any POs yet.

invoices.heroSubtitle: All invoices across every purchase order in {{project}}.

empty.title: No invoices yet.
empty.body: Invoices appear here once they're uploaded to a purchase order.

emptyFilter.title: No invoices match
emptyFilter.body: Try different filters or a different search term.

charts.noData: Not enough data to show this chart.

empty.title: No data yet.
empty.body: Reports will populate once purchase orders and invoices are added to this project.
